        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.SimpleRecord>? __SimpleRecord;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.SimpleRecord> __Create_SimpleRecord()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.SimpleRecord>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_SimpleRecord,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_SimpleRecord,
                IsRecordType = true,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
